heading_content_part: Privacy PolicySkip to contentHomeUpdateRelated ArticlesFAQfoo GamePrivacy Policy中文Search for:Privacy PolicyLast Modified:20220722Note that fooView & foo games group provided by fooView Inc. only collects anonymous software usage information to improve the software and it won’t collect, or share any of your personal information to anyone without your consent.

Related products:Include but not limited tofooView, FV Themes, FV File Explorer, FV Video Player and Editor, … developed by fooView.Checkers, Reversi, foo Board Games, Four in a line, ColorLines, Chinese Chess, Sudoku, Link, Mahjong Solitaire, Tripeaks, Freecell, Pyramids, … developed by foo Game Group.

Special For Google Drive Feature:fooView provides file management feature, including cloud files such as files on Google Drive, the user can access the files on his/her Google Drive from his/her mobile device.

decoder_heading: fooView’s use of information received from Google Drive APIs
ident_heading: fooView’s use of information received from Google Drive APIs
heading_content_part: fooView’s use of information received from Google Drive APIs will adhere to Google’s Google API User Data Policy and the Limited Use Requirements.

Special For Auto Task Feature:If you use location as condition to run a task, it will read the location data in background to check if the task should run, fooView won’t  store them on the card, or upload or share them.
